messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0097",
  "title": "港澳台移动游戏收入TOP榜",
  "page_index": 28,
  "page_range": "28"
}

Section text:
## 港澳台移动游戏收入TOP榜

message.content: This section provides a ranked list of top-grossing mobile games in the Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan markets. It can answer questions regarding: (1) Topics & Entities: Which specific mobile game titles lead in revenue generation within these three regions; (2) Metrics: Revenue performance, grossing ranks, and comparative market positioning of individual titles; (3) Tables, Figures & Evidence Types: Likely contains a leaderboard table or chart presenting ranked revenue data. The provided heading does not specify reporting dates, definitions, procedures, or analytical claims. Retrieval should focus on identifying top-performing game entities and their relative revenue rankings in the specified markets.
